title: hieracium allionii
intro: Hieracium allionii, also known as Allion's hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium allionii include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and salves, which are used to apply the plant's medicinal properties topically or internally.
